class.name: LSystem
class.brief_description: A Resource-backed L-system generator with callback-driven per-segment metadata.

method.name: generate_2d
method.description: Generates 2D hierarchy data and executes callback methods on [param context_node]. Returned node dictionaries include [code]sdf_type[/code] and conservatively expanded [code]bounds[/code].

method.name: generate_3d
method.description: Generates 3D hierarchy data and executes callback methods on [param context_node]. Returned node dictionaries include [code]sdf_type[/code] and conservatively expanded [code]bounds[/code].

method.name: get_byte_code
method.description: Returns compiled opcode bytecode for the current L-system configuration.

members.member: The starting string for L-system expansion.
Number of rewrite passes applied to [member axiom].
Turn angle in radians used by rotation opcodes.

Default runtime shape type for generated segments. Callbacks can update [code]l_system_info.sdf_type[/code] during generation, and the current value is copied onto each generated node as [code]sdf_type[/code].

Default runtime shape width for generated segments. Callbacks can update [code]l_system_info.sdf_width[/code] during generation, and the current value is copied onto each generated node as [code]sdf_width[/code].

Callback symbol table in [code]symbol -> method_name[/code] form. Keys are one-character symbols that appear in the expanded L-system string. Values are method names called on the context node during generation.
Initial callback payload dictionary. This payload is copied into callback state at generation start and then propagated to future segments as [code]extra_data[/code].
